title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SpiceJet Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at SpiceJet Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
